/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/codegen_test.dir/codegen_test.cpp.o -o codegen_test  liban24_codegen.a ../src/json_parser/libjson_parser.a ../src/jit_solver/libjit_solver.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a ../src/v2/libblueprint_v2.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a
